analysis.issue_detail: The closing section ("Пауза даёт время - но долг сохраняется") emphasizes procedural mechanics of stopping enforcement. This overlaps semantically with enforcement-removal articles. Suggest rephrasing final CTA to focus on prevention/earlier intervention rather than "how to stop it once enforcement begins".

suggested_changes.focus: Shift from 'how to stop enforcement' (procedural mechanics) to 'when to intervene before enforcement escalates' (preventive approach)
suggested_changes.final_block: Replace the closing block's focus on obtaining and maintaining the pause with emphasis on recognizing when to file the right preventive motion at the right time
